action.reasoning: Observation: Val LPIPS=0.26 but test LPIPS=0.45 - huge gap. PSNR similar (~16) suggests cameras are roughly correct but perceptual quality differs. Current predict.py has cam_dist=0.25, fovy=30.0. Analysis: Need systematic parameter search on validation data + diagnose the gap. Also try higher resolution rendering (512→256 downsample) which can improve perceptual quality. Decision: Run comprehensive parameter search with multiple cam_dist/fovy combos on 15 val objects, test higher-res rendering, check elevation distribution, then update predict.py with best settings.
